3330430.name: Meowcide: Kitties at War
3330430.description:
The world is on the edge: terrorist networks and dictatorships are tearing regions apart. In Meowcide: Kitties at War, you command the battle-hardened kitties of the Meowrican nation. Plan daring assaults, pull your comrades out of the fire, and claim victory against the odds. Face brutal firefights to the beats of adrenaline-fueled music, shocking twists, and a dark techno-thriller atmosphere — where you are just a single cog in someone’s sinister master plan.

SURVIVE AND ADAPT

In war, we win only by eliminating the enemy. Move fast, shoot straight. Meowcide is hardcore. Learn the rules and catch the vibe, and you’ll be rewarded with the satisfying feel of pulling the trigger and punishing the bad guys (plus a pouch of catnip after RTB).

ADAPT AND SURVIVE

The Yankee Squad is yours to command! Decide who goes into battle. Assault Meowls, Gunner Schwarz, Sniper Fluffer, and Demolitionist Fishbone — four cats, four unique fates, four sets of deadly weapons. Different styles, one mission: spread democracy and take out the bad guys. Dig deeper, explore the combat zone, and collect intel to unlock new weapons and possibly recruit new squad members.

STRIKE BACK AND WIN

Triumph in a world where enemy factions weave cunning conspiracies and their armies are strong and ruthless. Uncover a global crime, prevent the collapse of world order, and bring freedom to the oppressed animals of every nation.

Key features:

  • Hardcore Top-Down Combat: fast, intense firefights where every mistake can be fatal.

  • Cats are Cute: yes, Corporal, I know you have paws. Fall in line!

  • Tactics Matter: plan strikes, rescue your squadmates, and win at great risk.

  • Dark Techno-Thriller World: a gripping story with unexpected twists and a tense atmosphere.

  • Pounding Soundtrack: 140 BPM is just the beginning.

  • Global Conflict: fight terrorists and dictators across the world.
3330430.supported_languages:
英语*, 俄语
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
